case_title: DONALD J. SCHWARCZ VS. SUSAN ADAMS et al

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 9/26/12 TO DEFENDANT DINO DARROCA, "RETURNED TO SENDER".
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ADAMS, SUSAN HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SCHWARCZ, DONALD J. AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, SUSAN DARROCA, DINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER / SENT TO PLAINTIFF

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-06-2012 IN DEPT. 506 . DEFENDANT PAID $3495.00 IN CASH TO THE PLAINTIFF, THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCHWARCZ, DONALD J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $47.50 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE SERVED AUG-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, SUSAN

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SUSAN ADAMS, DINO DARROCA SET FOR NOV-16-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-06-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. "PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT FOR $3,495.00 UNTIL DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY WITHIN 2 WEEKS, BY NOVEMBER 30, 2012. IF NO APPEARANCE ON DEC 6,2012, THE CASE SHOULD BE DISMISSED, SETTLED. PLAINTIFF HAS INDICATED (FOLLOWING THE HEARING) THAT HE WANTS TO COLLECT HIS ATTORNEY FEES FROM DEFENDANT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $47.50 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE SERVED AUG-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DARROCA, DINO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARCZ, DONALD J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, SUSAN DARROCA, DINO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
